evidence: "I LOVE this show...the new season, the first scenes, delegating people between vax and not."
"I am a huge history buff, and thought I could stomach Clooneys narration..."
"Some of it was hard to follow, had to rewind sometimes."
"It was so hard to follow along. Never sure if Jo was thinking about and acting out scenes from the past, or are they present."
"I could feel my anxiety level grow every minute as I watched this."
"It started out great, but there are way too many America Bashing comments, that have nothing to do with the story."
"The acting is terrible. It's like a tribute to old washed up gangster movie stars."
"I Love Adam Driver, so I thought I would love this."
"I love Falco, and was happy to see her back."
"Well made, very little dialogue, but the visuals are enough."
"Thank you to the people who made this movie. I was in tears many times..."
"Brave subject to make a movie about..I hope it helps some people afflicted with these terrible disorders."

summary: The user shows a strong preference for high-quality productions, particularly in political dramas and historical narratives, though they often find these narratives complex and hard to follow. They value emotional impact in storytelling but express frustration with excessive political commentary that detracts from the story.
